title: Battery Revolution Tracker Update — Wed Apr 29, 2026
summary: CATL signed the world's largest sodium-ion battery order — a 60 GWh three-year supply agreement with grid integrator HyperStrong — while separately declaring sodium-ion mass production readiness in 2026 targeting 600 km EV range. CATL's third-generation Shenxing LFP battery achieved full charge (10%–98%) in under 7 minutes, setting a new benchmark for affordable fast-charging chemistry. Lithium carbonate prices in China spiked ~126% from the Q4 2025 trough to approximately $26,000/tonne in Q1 2026, driven by Zimbabwe export suspensions and depleted inventories. Samsung SDI entered final negotiations with Amazon AWS for a $700M+ data center battery backup supply deal, reflecting surging AI-driven data center power demand. Australia's grid battery pipeline reached 67.3 GW — a 62% annual surge — and FAMU-FSU researchers published a non-flammable zinc-ion hydrogel battery sustaining 900+ cycles.

title: Battery Revolution Tracker Update — Thu Apr 23, 2026
summary: Coverage widened on April 23 for CATL's Tech Day announcement (held April 21) of its third-generation Shenxing LFP ultra-fast-charging battery. ABB E-mobility officially launched the OM M-Series, a modular air-cooled DC fast-charging platform that scales from 200 kW to 1.2 MW across 36 site configurations. Australia's Grid Battery Pipeline Reaches 67.3 GW — 62% Annual Surge.
